name: Tiger Okoshi
abstract: Toru "Tiger" Okoshi (born March 21, 1950) is an American jazz fusion trumpeter born in Ashiya, Japan. After studying at Kwansei Gakuin University, Okoshi moved to the U.S.

about_quotes.speaker: George Russell
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...the International Living Time Orchestra – your musicians are from all over, aren’t they? ... Tiger Okoshi, a Japanese gentleman
about_quotes.doc_title: George Russell — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: We did Meditations. Caris is on that. Tiger Okoshi’s on that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
